title: 250 mm Quadcopter Drone Flight Controller
description: 250 mm wheelbase quad with custom STM32F4 flight controller, ICM-42688-P IMU, cascaded PID attitude control at 4 kHz inner loop, and 4× BLHeli-32 ESCs.
objective: Hover ±5 cm altitude; attitude hold ±2°; response bandwidth >20 Hz.
constraints: AUW ≤ 500 g with 4S 1500 mAh LiPo; ≥ 5 min flight.
supporting_fact_titles: IMU (Inertial Measurement Unit) for Robot Navigation
Brushless DC (BLDC) Motor for Suction Fan
design_element_titles: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller

element_usage_notes.Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controlle: Outer attitude 50 Hz; inner rate 4 kHz. Betaflight RPM filter.
